# snapcd_agent_namespace_supply (Resource)

Manages an Agent Namespace Supply in Snap CD. Permits modules within the Namespace to select this Agent for missions.




<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) ID of the Agent that is assigned to the Namespace.
- `namespace_id` (String) ID of the Namespace to which the Agent is assigned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the Agent Namespace Supply.
